course: Introduction to Advanced Concepts in Java

modules.name: File I/O and Design Patterns
modules.description: File reading and writing in Java, three-layer application architecture, repository and domain patterns, MVC pattern, service testing with test doubles, and dependency injection.

lessons.title: File I/O
topics: Reading from and writing to files in Java

lessons.title: Application Layers
topics: Benefits of layered design for maintainability

lessons.title: Testing the Repository
topics: JUnit test setup for file-based repositories

lessons.title: The Domain Layer
topics: Separating domain logic from data access

lessons.title: The MVC Pattern
topics: Controller coordination between view and model
Separation of UI from business logic

modules.name: Functional Idioms
modules.description: BigDecimal for precise financial calculations, temporal types for dates and times, Spring Framework and dependency injection with XML and annotation configuration, lambda expressions, and the Streams API.

lessons.title: BigDecimal
topics: BigDecimal operations: add, subtract, multiply, divide

lessons.title: Temporal Types in SQL
topics: SQL date and time data types
Extracting date parts: YEAR, MONTH, DAY

lessons.title: Spring
topics: Spring projects: Framework, Data, Security, Boot

lessons.title: Spring DI with XML Configuration
topics: Constructor and property injection in XML
Wiring a three-layer architecture with XML

lessons.title: Three Layer Architecture DI with Annotations
Streams
topics: Streams vs. iteration for data processing

assessment.title: Summative Assessments
items: Summative Assessment: Airport Terminal Management System
